notes: Sources are used to guide offline candidate generation and validation only.
No external source is used to justify gold/public-query memorization.

sources.how_it_applies: Use strict eval, hidden-style eval, packaging readiness, and metric deltas as blocking gates before accepting any score075 branch.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Directly matches the need to compare candidate behavior before promotion.
sources.result: Encoded as promotion gates and integration validation protocol.

sources.how_it_applies: Separate workers generate candidate families while the selector/integration workers perform pairwise evaluation and selection.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Useful pattern, but adapted to deterministic local validation rather than multi-agent runtime execution.
sources.result: Candidate generation and execution selector branches are isolated and blocked behind validation.
sources.technique_name: CHASE-SQL multi-path candidate generation and selection

sources.how_it_applies: Local-index and endpoint-routing workers focus on Parquet-derived value grounding and safe schema relation preservation.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Potentially improves grounding without gold labels if evidence provenance is enforced.
sources.result: Assigned to local-index, endpoint-routing, and candidate-generation workers.
sources.technique_name: CHESS schema/value retrieval and schema pruning

sources.how_it_applies: Backlog classification decomposes failures into endpoint, schema, SQL, answer-shape, and dry-run evidence tasks.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Fits the coordinator role without adding runtime multi-agent complexity.
sources.result: Improvement backlog separates targeted failure types and worker ownership.

sources.how_it_applies: Used only as a caution to rank and organize candidates; no public-example prompt examples are introduced.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Example selection can overfit this benchmark, so only ranking discipline is kept.
sources.result: No runtime few-shot public-example mechanism is added by coordinator.

sources.how_it_applies: Schema-routing workers must preserve recall and hidden-style stability; schema pruning cannot weaken robustness.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Prevents score gains from brittle schema omissions.
sources.result: Hidden-style 48/48 and no reduced candidate diversity are merge requirements.

sources.how_it_applies: Execution-selector worker validates and scores isolated candidates before any integration trial.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Execution feedback is valuable as long as it remains offline/scored and not gold-driven at runtime.
sources.result: Assigned to execution selector and autonomous packaged trial workflow.

sources.how_it_applies: Candidate workers must parse SQL, identify tables/columns, and reject destructive or unknown-schema candidates.
sources.reason_kept_or_rejected: Keeps generated candidates structurally safe before execution.
sources.result: Included in worker and selector safety requirements.
